query:
-- Aus Ships services
SELECT externalId, name, serviceType, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, status
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C7513'
ORDER BY serviceType;

-- Aus Ships billing items (all platforms)
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.billingPlatform, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.invoiceDate, bi.contactName
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = 'C7513'
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
